Ported step text quality: Steps 0.5, 1d, 3a-3e, and Operational Notes are complete, coherent, and additive [weight: 22%]: Read the updated plugins/trine-eval/skills/sprint-workflow/SKILL.md. PASS requires ALL of: (a) Step 0.5 covers 4 guard conditions, verbatim-execution mandate, Windows-bash hazard note, run-file shape, and fail_fast default. (b) Step 1d names the trigger condition (post-APPROVED, pre-IMPLEMENTATION), config guard (taxonomy.emit_tasks_json), schema cross-reference (sprint-contract/SKILL.md), audit-chain consequence, and features.json advancement (DEC-0019). (c) Steps 3c-3e: 3c distinguishes trial loop from retry loop with the `trials` knob and `-tT` file naming; 3d covers batch API trigger conditions and the byte-for-byte file-shape invariant; 3e covers trailer extraction protocol, failure-tolerant posture, and backward compatibility. (d) Operational Notes contains (i) Evaluator Fallback subsection (tool-limitation-only escape valve, Process Note disclosure, 3/5 rubric penalty) and (ii) thinking.profile subsection (default/fast/thorough reserved values and runtime translations). (e) Additive integrity: existing Step 0-5 bodies, JIT annotations, Lazy Loading table, Session Resumption section unchanged.

Council-gate wording quality: b1 and b2 gates are correct, complete, and respect the andon-stop protocol [weight: 4%]: Read the governance-gate additions in plugins/trine-eval/skills/sprint-workflow/SKILL.md. PASS requires ALL of: (a) b1 fires when governance.enabled is true AND governance.review_frequency is set; checks for .council/sprint-prebrief/sprint-{NN}.json; emits WARN if missing; does NOT block; placed within Step 0 before Step 0.5. (b) b2 fires when governance.enabled is true AND governance.review_frequency == 'every-sprint'; invokes /henkaten-council:council-autorun as the final action of Step 5 after progress.md/sprint-state.json/git checkpoint, before user-report; surfaces andon halt or autonomy-floor breach to the user before next-sprint offer. (c) Backward compat: when governance.enabled is false or governance key absent, neither gate fires. (d) No blocking in b1 (warn-only; no fail_fast wording).

Should NOT apply semantic edits to sprint-07.md or sprint-08.md beyond renumbering: SN2 carve-out permits ONLY renumbering Sprint N references (9->10, 10->11, 11->12) and the addition of the required `## Revision History` block. Any prose change, criterion text edit, weight change, or new criteria is a FAIL.
